info.title: Ecomapp Main-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp Main-buildTime is the primary API for managing e-commerce operations including products, orders, and user accounts.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product listings, details, and management.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for creating, updating, and tracking customer orders.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management including registration, authentication, and profile updates.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Processing and management of payment transactions and billing.

get.summary: Retrieve the current shopping cart for a user
get.description: Fetches the shopping cart details associated with the specified userId, including all items currently in the cart. Returns the complete cart structure and totals.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

example.message: The userId provided is not valid.

details.issue: Must be a valid UUID string

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must specify the product details and quantity. Returns the updated cart after addition.

requestBody.description: Item to add to the user's cart

200.description: Item added successfully and cart updated

400.description: Invalid input for adding item to cart

example.message: The provided cart item information is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

500.description: Internal server error during add to cart

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the specified user
post.description: Creates a new order based on the current shopping cart for the user identified by userId. Returns confirmation details including order id and order summary.

400.description: Invalid userId or order placement request

example.message: Order placement failed due to invalid user or cart state.

details.issue: User does not exist or cart is empty

404.description: User or resources not found for placing order

example.message: No user exists with the provided userId.

500.description: Internal server error while placing order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Fetches detailed information about an order specified by the orderId, including items, price, status, and timestamps.

example.message: The orderId provided is not valid.

details.issue: Must be a valid UUID string

example.message: No order exists with the specified orderId.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process using the provided payment details such as amount, payment method, and order info. Returns confirmation including payment id and status.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request with necessary details

example.message: Payment request details are missing or invalid.

details.issue: Amount must be a positive number

402.description: Payment required or failed due to insufficient funds

example.message: Payment failed due to insufficient funds or declined card.

500.description: Internal server error during payment initiation

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receives and processes payment webhook events from external payment gateways. Expects a JSON payload that contains details about the payment event. Returns a confirmation response acknowledging receipt of the webhook.

requestBody.description: Payload representing payment webhook event details

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.

402.description: Payment required or payment processing failed

example.message: Payment status indicates failure or pending action.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while processing webhook

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the product catalog. Accepts a JSON request body describing product details such as name, description, price, and stock. Returns the newly created product information upon success.

example.message: One or more fields in the product data are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Product already exists with the given identifier

example.message: A product with the same name or SKU already exists.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while adding product

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the latest tracking information for the specified order. Requires the unique order identifier as a path parameter. Returns shipping status, estimated delivery date, and current location details.

404.description: Order not found or tracking information unavailable

example.message: No order exists with the given orderId or tracking information is missing.

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or is invalid

500.description: Internal error while fetching tracking information

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account based on the provided user details. Accepts a JSON payload containing user registration information such as username, email, and password. Returns the registered user profile upon successful registration.

example.message: Registration data is incomplete or contains invalid fields.

409.description: User already exists with provided details

example.message: A user with the provided email or username already exists.

500.description: Internal server error during user registration

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: The currency code for the item's price, following ISO 4217 standard.

discount.description: The discount amount applied to this item.

finalPrice.description: The final price after applying any discounts.

price.description: The original price of a single unit of the item.

quantity.description: The number of units of the product in the cart.

currency.description: The currency code for the cart totals, following ISO 4217 standard.

items.description: List of items currently in the user's cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts are applied.

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items before any discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user owning the cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the order item after discounts.

price.description: Original price of a single unit of the order item.

productId.description: Unique identifier for the ordered product.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

currency.description: Currency code used for the order prices, following ISO 4217 standard.

items.description: List of items included in this order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid for the order after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current status of the order processing.

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the entire order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid in the specified currency

currency.description: The three-letter ISO currency code for the payment

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order related to this payment

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway processing the payment

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment chosen by the customer

amount.description: The amount that was processed in the payment

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

currency.description: The currency used for the payment transaction

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order linked to the payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: The method used to make the payment

transactionId.description: Identifier assigned by the payment processor for the transaction

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway after processing

paymentId.description: Unique identifier of the payment being reported by the webhook

status.description: Updated status of the payment triggered by the webhook event

transactionId.description: Payment processor transaction identifier included in the webhook

available.description: Indicates whether the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

currency.description: Currency code in which the price of the product is denominated

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

brand.description: The brand name of the product

category.description: The category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product record was created

currency.description: The currency code used for the product price

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

price.description: Price of the product in the specified currency

rating.description: Average user rating for the product

stock.description: Number of units available in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the product record

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the shipment

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last tracking update

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

trackingId.description: Tracking identifier provided by the courier

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

country.description: Country of residence of the user

phone.description: Contact phone number of the user

userType.description: Type or role of the user in the system

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

email.description: Registered email address of the user

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user account

userType.description: Role or type classification of the user

timestamp.description: Error occurrence timestamp in ISO 8601 format

path.description: Request path where the error occurred

timestamp.description: Error occurrence timestamp in ISO 8601 format
